retry_reason: refcount_inc always succeeds, so no failure path exists; retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: This is an acquire/get wrapper that takes an additional reference on a fuse_req by unconditionally incrementing its refcount. The caller must already have a valid reference to the request (i.e., the request is alive) and must later release this reference with a corresponding put (e.g., fuse_put_request). The function has no return value and no failure path; it is typically used to extend the lifetime of a request for asynchronous operations or other purposes where an extra reference is needed.

judge.reason: The function consists solely of a refcount_inc call on the request's count; no other logic exists, making it a pure get-wrapper.
